description: A satellite operator has left a specifications document at ~/Desktop/geo_sat_specs.txt describing the CommStar-7 geostationary communications satellite. Design and simulate a GTO-to-GEO transfer mission in GMAT using the parameters and orbital targets provided in that document. Use a DifferentialCorrector to target the required GEO insertion. Save the resulting GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/geo_transfer.script and record the mission results, including DeltaV1_mps, DeltaV2_mps, TotalDeltaV_mps, GEO_SMA_km, GEO_ECC, and GEO_INC_deg, to ~/GMAT_output/geo_transfer_results.txt. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
